message:
test(linalg): wire cholesky_solve conformance cases

Added 4 differential goldens for cholesky_solve covering 1x1 scalar
solve, 2x2 SPD with [[2,1],[1,2]], 3x3 SPD with the classic
[[4,12,-16],[12,37,-43],[-16,-43,98]] textbook factor, and the
identity-L short-circuit. Dispatcher now accepts matrix[0] as flat L,
rhs as b, shape=[n,n].

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
